# Interoperability Conformance Suite

Runtime and source controls for external interface contracts across payment embeds, note-claim embeds, scheduler embed flows, and booking policy gates.

<details>

| `source.calendar.embed.owner_resolution` | `pass` | Calendar embed resolves public owner profile and denies private or missing owners. |
| `source.calendar.embed.settings_auth_gate` | `pass` | Calendar embed settings update endpoint requires authenticated owner session. |
| `source.calendar.embed.slot_computation` | `pass` | Calendar embed computes deterministic slot windows from schedule configuration. |
| `source.embed.checkout.amount_bounds` | `pass` | Embed checkout enforces min and max USD amount bounds. |
| `source.embed.checkout.callback_allowlist` | `pass` | Embed checkout restricts callback URLs to HTTPS or localhost HTTP. |
| `source.embed.checkout.currency_lock` | `pass` | Embed checkout allows only USD currency contract. |
| `source.embed.checkout.payload_limits` | `pass` | Embed checkout enforces payload length and JSON decode guards. |
| `source.embed.cross_surface.contract_linkage` | `pass` | Calendar and payment embed builders target their matching API surfaces. |
| `source.embed.merchant_resolution` | `pass` | Embed merchant resolution enforces username normalization and public-profile checks. |
| `source.embed.note_claim.file_size_limits` | `pass` | Embed note claim enforces JSON and upload size limits. |
| `source.embed.note_claim.merchant_resolution` | `pass` | Embed note claim resolves merchant by username before settlement claim. |
| `source.embed.note_claim.token_extraction` | `pass` | Embed note claim extracts note token from payload artifacts safely. |
| `source.integrity.required_files_present` | `pass` | All referenced source files for interoperability conformance are present and hashable. |

</details>

## Evidence Anchors

- [interoperability.conformance.json](snapshots/2026-03-28/interoperability.conformance.json) contains the full imported report payload.
- `requirements[]` maps standards-level requirement IDs to check IDs.
- `checks[]` contains the source and runtime assertions and their human-readable descriptions.
- `revision` identifies the current conformance revision and the number of hashed source files in scope.
- `evidence.sourceDigests[]` in the snapshot lists the referenced live source file digests.
- `history` contains the signed snapshot metadata, badge route, and history route for this suite.
